svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="pub-session-states" name="Publishing Session States"> <mxGraphModel dx="-546" dy="-249" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1080" pageHeight="680" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="start" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#000000;strokeColor=#000000;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="20" x="185" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="open" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontStyle=1" value="open" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="120" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="processing" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontStyle=1" value="processing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="480" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="published" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1" value="published
(terminal)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="840" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="error" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontStyle=1" value="error" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="480" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="canceled" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1" value="canceled
(terminal)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="120" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;fontStyle=2;" value="Cancel during processing is rejected with 409 (not a transition)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="370" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_start_open" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="open"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_open_processing" edge="1" parent="1" source="open" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="processing" value="publish accepted, deferred (202)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_processing_published" edge="1" parent="1" source="processing" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="published" value="deferred processing succeeds"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_open_published" edge="1" parent="1" source="open" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="published" value="publish completed immediately (201)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_open_canceled" edge="1" parent="1" source="open" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="canceled" value="cancel (DELETE)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_open_self" edge="1" parent="1" source="open" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.25;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.75;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;" target="open" value="edit files; sync publish failure"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="60" y="215" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_processing_error" edge="1" parent="1" source="processing" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.4;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.4;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="error" value="deferred processing fails"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.6" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_error_processing" edge="1" parent="1" source="error" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.6;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.6;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="processing" value="retry publish (202)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.6" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_error_published" edge="1" parent="1" source="error" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="published" value="retry publish (201)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_error_canceled" edge="1" parent="1" source="error" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="canceled" value="cancel (DELETE)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_error_self" edge="1" parent="1" source="error" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.3;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.7;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;" target="error" value="edit files; sync publish failure"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="555" y="545" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
